title: WATERMEDIA: Multimedia Binaries
body:
# WATERMEDIA: Multimedia Binaries
This mod its a dependency for WATERMeDIA, containing the native binaries like VLC and FFMPEG and essential code to extract the files in the watermedia paths.

Avoids users to install any third party software, making watermedia finally pluug and play for Windows, Mac and Linux (android not included)

CRITICAL: this is only intended to work with WATERMeDIA V3
